about.title: Who we are
about.text: A volunteer-run club built on community, fair play and a love of the game.

teams.title: Find your team
teams.text: From competitive leagues to youth development — there's a spot for everyone.

news.title: Club news
news.text: Match reports, announcements and everything happening at Smashing '72.

join.title: Join Smashing '72
join.text: New members are always welcome — come along for a free trial session before you decide.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.text: Questions about joining, training or the club? Send us a message.
